scope.target: Downstream evidence intake, backlog registration, roadmap reordering, and durable implementation handoff
constraints: Do not modify the downstream repository
Do not implement package fixes in the planning session
Preserve external evidence identity and distinguish it from a local assessment

steps: Pin downstream commits, assessment, workflow, observed operations, and validation results
Create HIGH/P0 backlog items with v0.4.1 acceptance criteria
Reorder the live roadmap and indexes
Create a draft remediation report and exact resume checkpoint
execution.last_completed_step: Created the durable evidence, backlog, roadmap, workflow, task, and draft remediation-report handoff set.
execution.next_action: Resume V041-002 from committed planning checkpoint 69ac74f5c9eeeb9efe8a9055a812348773127d0b in a new source-repository session.

results.summary: Promoted two proven downstream package failures to HIGH/P0 v0.4.1 blockers and reordered the active remediation flow around them.
results.residual_risk: Both productized package defects remain fully present until V041-002 and V041-003 are implemented and independently verified.
